client_request: We need a system where customers can book appointments online, get reminders, and the admin team can manage bookings. It should be simple, mobile-friendly, and maybe include reports later.

projectOverview.clientDescription: We need a system where customers can book appointments online, get reminders, and the admin team can manage bookings. It should be simple, mobile-friendly, and maybe include reports later.
projectOverview.cleanDescription: Development of an intuitive, online appointment booking system designed to streamline customer scheduling, automate reminders, and provide administrative staff with comprehensive tools for booking management. The system will prioritize user simplicity and mobile accessibility.
projectOverview.businessGoal: To enhance operational efficiency, improve customer satisfaction by providing a seamless online booking experience, and empower administrative staff with effective tools for managing appointments.

objectives: Enable customers to easily book appointments online 24/7.
Automate appointment reminders to reduce no-shows and improve customer communication.
Provide the administrative team with a centralized, efficient platform for managing all appointments and service offerings.
Ensure the system is user-friendly, intuitive, and fully accessible across various mobile devices.
Establish a foundation for future reporting capabilities to support business insights.

stakeholders.description: Individuals seeking to book and manage appointments online for services offered by the business.
Team members responsible for managing appointments, customer data, service offerings, and staff schedules within the system.
Decision-makers who oversee business operations and require insights into appointment trends and system performance.

functionalRequirements.title: Customer Account Management
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow customers to register, log in securely, and manage their personal profile information.
acceptance_criteria: A new customer shall be able to create an account using an email address and password.
Existing customers shall be able to log in securely with their credentials.
Customers shall be able to view and update their profile details (e.g., name, contact information).
Customers shall be able to reset their password.

functionalRequirements.title: Service Browsing and Selection
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow customers to browse available services, view descriptions, and select a service for booking.
acceptance_criteria: Customers shall be able to view a list of all available services.
Each service entry shall display a clear description, duration, and associated cost (if applicable).
Customers shall be able to select a service to proceed with booking.

functionalRequirements.title: Appointment Booking
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall enable customers to select an available date and time slot for a chosen service and confirm their booking.
acceptance_criteria: Customers shall be presented with an intuitive calendar view showing available dates and time slots for the selected service.
The system shall prevent customers from selecting already booked or unavailable slots.
Customers shall be able to review booking details before final confirmation.
Upon successful booking, the system shall display a confirmation message.

functionalRequirements.title: Automated Reminders and Confirmations
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall automatically send booking confirmations and reminders to customers via their preferred communication channel (e.g., email, SMS).
acceptance_criteria: A booking confirmation shall be sent to the customer immediately after a successful booking.
An appointment reminder shall be sent to the customer at a configurable interval (e.g., 24 hours) prior to the appointment.
Confirmation and reminder messages shall include essential booking details (service, date, time, location).

functionalRequirements.title: Administrator Dashboard and Login
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall provide a secure login for administrative staff and a dashboard to oversee all aspects of appointment management.
acceptance_criteria: Administrative staff shall be able to log in securely using unique credentials.
Upon login, administrators shall access a dashboard displaying an overview of current and upcoming appointments.
The dashboard shall provide quick access to key management functions.

functionalRequirements.title: Appointment Management (Admin)
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow administrative staff to view, create, modify, and cancel customer appointments.
acceptance_criteria: Administrators shall be able to view all appointments in a list or calendar format.
Administrators shall be able to manually create new appointments for customers.
Administrators shall be able to edit details of existing appointments (e.g., time, service, customer info).
Administrators shall be able to cancel appointments, triggering appropriate notifications to customers.

functionalRequirements.title: Service and Staff Availability Management (Admin)
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall enable administrative staff to define and manage available services, their durations, and staff availability.
acceptance_criteria: Administrators shall be able to add, edit, and delete services offered.
For each service, administrators shall be able to configure its duration, description, and applicable staff.
Administrators shall be able to set staff working hours and days off, which impacts appointment availability.

functionalRequirements.title: Basic Reporting (Admin)
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall provide basic reporting functionalities for administrators to view appointment summaries.
acceptance_criteria: Administrators shall be able to view a summary of appointments per day/week/month.
Administrators shall be able to filter appointment summaries by service or staff member.
The system shall display the total number of bookings within a selected period.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Mobile Responsiveness
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The user interface shall be fully responsive and optimized for seamless experience across various mobile devices (smartphones, tablets) and web browsers.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: User Interface Simplicity
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system's user interface for both customers and administrators shall be intuitive, easy to navigate, and require minimal training.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Performance and Responsiveness
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: All critical pages (e.g., service browsing, booking form, admin dashboard) shall load within 3 seconds under typical load conditions (e.g., 50 concurrent users).

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Security for User Data
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall implement industry-standard security measures to protect customer personal data and prevent unauthorized access to administrative functions, including data encryption in transit and at rest.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: System Uptime
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall maintain an uptime of at least 99.5%, excluding scheduled maintenance windows.

assumptions: The client will provide detailed information regarding services offered, their durations, associated staff, and business operating hours.
Access to a reliable internet connection is available for all users (customers and administrators).
Email and/or SMS gateway services for sending automated notifications will be integrated or provided.
The initial scope does not include payment processing or complex inventory management integrations.
Compliance with relevant data privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) will be addressed during implementation.
constraints: The project must adhere to a strict budget, the details of which will be finalized post-requirements gathering.
The initial deployment timeline is targeted for Q4 of the current year.
Integration with existing legacy systems is out of scope for Phase 1.
The system must operate independently without relying on specific hardware other than standard client devices.
acceptanceCriteria: All identified Functional Requirements (FR-XXX) are implemented and successfully tested according to their specified acceptance criteria.
All identified Non-Functional Requirements (NFR-XXX) are met and validated through appropriate testing methodologies.
Customers can successfully register, log in, browse services, book appointments, and receive confirmations/reminders.
Administrative staff can securely log in, view, create, modify, and cancel appointments, and manage services/staff availability.
The system is accessible and fully functional on major web browsers and mobile devices (iOS & Android).
